description: Tier 3C WebSocket-based services test — expect error display, not custom warning
expected_behavior: APF blocks HTTP POST. WebSocket services may show error or no response. Custom warning unlikely.
steps_per_service: 2. Wait for page to fully load
3. Find the chat input (may require free account login for character.ai)
4. Type or paste the test prompt
7. Take a screenshot of the result
8. Check if any error message or warning is displayed
9. Note any console errors or network failures
notes: These services primarily use WebSocket. APF intercepts HTTP POST requests, but the frontend may not parse the SSE response. Expect Tier 1.5 behavior (error display) at best.
